nasb.text: I know that everything God does will remain forever; there is nothing to add to it and there is nothing to take from it, for God has so worked that men should fear Him.

esv.text: I perceived that whatever God does endures forever; nothing can be added to it, nor anything taken from it. God has done it, so that people fear before him.

cnv.text: 我知道　神所作的一切，都必永存，無可增添，無可減少；　神這樣作，為要使人在他面前存敬畏的心。

ccb.text: 我知道，上帝所做的都会存到永远，谁也不能增减。祂这样安排是叫人敬畏祂。

csbs.text: 我知道：神所做的一切，都必永存，无可增添，无可减少；神这样做，是要人在他面前心存敬畏。
